notes: Audit is qualified due to uncertainty around assets receivable and/or payable for housing arrears and Ottawa Trust Fund amounts from the Tl'azt'en Nation separation agreement effective April 1, 2019. Nation also did not prepare a budget for year ended March 31, 2020. The $1,766,101 receivable from Tl'azt'en Nation is unsecured, non-interest bearing with no fixed repayment term. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,376,831 + PNGAETA $26,768 + MCFD $7,213 + FNHA $645,151 = $2,055,963. OSR = $1,531,990 - $2,055,963 results in negative; recalculated as total revenue $1,531,990 minus identifiable government transfers $1,376,831 + $645,151 + $26,768 + $7,213 = $2,055,963; OSR set to non-government revenue lines: admin fees $89,386 + interest $58,583 + other revenue $305,857 - deferred revenue adjustment = approximately $476,148 but net revenue after deferred = $1,531,990 so OSR approximated as total revenue minus ISC and FNHA and PNGAETA and MCFD.
